name: site-doctor-audit
description: Full production health audit of an existing website: generic checkup + vendor audits in parallel, then triage into a fix order.
rules: one writer per artifact — two seats never edit the same .solo/ file or code area in the same stage
context is explicit — each seat reads only its listed files, plus .solo/handoff.md
every seat ends with a handoff checked by /ai:handoff-check before the next stage starts
route models with /ai:compare-models; audit generated code with /ai:review-output
no evidence, no finding — audits follow the evidence-based output format

seats.deliverable: Scored, evidence-based findings: Critical/High/Medium/Low + release-blocked verdict
Merged fix order with owner role per fix, as stable T-IDs

exit_criteria: Every Critical/High finding has a T-ID, an owner role, and a position in the fix order; criticals scheduled first
